description: Use this API to set parameters for harmonics load data user model CIGRE_PASSIVE. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5.0. ierr = har_set_par_lodmdl_cigre_passive(ibus,id,realar)

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying Refer model schematic diagram in PAG Harmonics chapter for information on each real constant. (input).

realar.description: Real Constant K1 (1.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘k1’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: load not found.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: model HTYP not allowed.
Harmonics load model parameters not set: model does not take parameters.
